title: Treetops glowing during storms captured on film for first time
content: For the first time, footage shows the canopy of surf‑acup tigers (Lynx montis) during inclement conditions. Researchers captured high‑resolution images that reveal the vivid glow of the trees' fur-like patterns in stormy weather. The study highlights the adaptive lighting traits of the species. It demonstrates how bright environments can enhance visual cues for predators and prey, expanding understanding of marine mammal behavior.

title: 坐厕 or 蹲厕，究竟哪一个更卫生安全？两项研究揭示：家庭卫生间的细菌数量是公共卫生间的10到1000倍；蹲厕气溶胶风险比坐厕更高 | 原文
content: Both public and private toilets contain bacteria, but studies show that household bathrooms have 10 to 1,000 times more bacteria than public ones. However, public toilets pose a higher aerosol risk because squat toilets generate more airborne particles than seated toilets. Thus, while home bathrooms are generally dirtier in terms of bacterial load, public toilets, especially squat ones, may present a greater chance of airborne exposure.

title: 现在 AI 来了，如果有天不需要程序员？
content: The text discusses the anticipated rise of AI and its impact on employment, particularly programmers. It argues that not everyone works in large tech firms and urges readers to plan for the future by identifying suitable roles. Blaming technology or society fails to change personal circumstances; instead, one must observe reality, analyze current conditions, understand why we reached this point, recognize patterns, learn lessons, and then take action. The author concludes with a self‑labeling remark as a “realistic fool.”

title: 张雪召回已交付 286 台的 820RR 机车，系泄压阀 O 型密封圈装反，如何看待此事及其处置方案？
content: Zhangxue Motor issued a recall for its 820RR locomotive, delivered to 286 owners. On April 16, a unit in Yinchuan suffered a crankcase rupture due to an incorrectly installed pressure‑relief valve O‑ring, which later loosened and caused oil leakage and piston damage. Owners must stop using the units and have them towed to authorized dealers for repair. Customers with affected motors may return the vehicle or trade it, or if the valve isn’t loose, receive two free maintenance visits after replacing the O‑ring.

title: XOR'ing a register with itself is the idiom for zeroing it out. Why not sub?
content: XORing a register with itself is a common low‑level idiom for setting it to zero because it can be done in a single instruction with no flags affected. Unlike subtraction, which clears the carry/borrow flags, XOR leaves flags unchanged, keeping code paths simpler. This technique also works on many processors where XOR‑register constraints are less strict than sub‑immediate or sub‑register forms.

title: 两大芯片巨头，双双重仓中国
content: Samsung and SK Hynix, two Korean storage‑chip leaders, have heavily invested in China amid US export controls and global AI‑driven memory demand. Since the 1990s, Korea’s aggressive R&D turned it into the dominant DRAM and NAND producer, with key factories in Xi’an, Wuxi, and Dalian supplying most of China’s consumer electronics. Facing U.S. restrictions, the companies use split‑manufacturing and supply‑chain tweaks to keep production alive. Meanwhile, Chinese firms like ChangXin and Yangtze Memory are rapidly expanding, capturing market share and prompting PC makers to shift supplies back to China.

Items bearing the “allergy‑free” label automatically command higher prices because sufferers, beset by unpredictable, recurrent symptoms, equate cost with efficacy. Consequently, the allergy industry fuels a cycle of heightened anxiety and inflated spending among young consumers.

Meituan’s LongCat API offered a new Sphynx model for invited developers, while Alibaba released its HappyHorse‑1.0 video‑generation model for enterprise trials. content: An 11‑year‑old girl named Chen Yue was repeatedly abused and trafficked beginning in February 2021. She was introduced at age 11 to a 17‑year‑old, then at 12 to a 31‑year‑old, both resulting in sexual assault. By age 13, she was forced into prostitution and involved in violent crime. In March 2024, the author met her at a hotel in Zhengzhou and spent three weeks with her, while her mother, Zhang Jing, sought legal protection.

title: ChatGPT Images 2.0震撼发布，碾压谷歌Nano Banana，设计真要完了
content: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Images 2.0, a new image‑generation model that delivers higher precision, better text rendering, and support for 2 K resolution and a wide range of aspect ratios. It excels in complex visuals, multilingual text (Japanese, Korean, Chinese, etc.), and stylistic fidelity, offering “thinking” mode to browse the web, iterate multiple images at once, and verify outputs. Available to ChatGPT, Codex, and API users, it improves on previous models but still struggles with highly detailed physical structures and ultra‑dense textures.

content: The article discusses China’s 2024 AI race among internet giants, highlighting ByteDance’s leading role with aggressive GPU procurement, model development, and hardware experiments, contrasted with Alibaba’s broad‑spectrum investment, Tencent’s cautious AI integration, and Apple’s minimal, defensive approach. It examines how AI threatens traditional “super‑entry” ecosystems, turning apps from traffic generators into merely execution platforms. The piece reflects on historical tech cycles, noting how firms like Microsoft, Intel, and Apple have navigated past shifts, and warns that failure to adopt AI risks obsolescence.

content: OpenAI has released ChatGPT Images 2.0, a next‑generation image generator that can understand complex Chinese prompts, render UI elements, and even laser‑etch text on a grain of rice. It offers “thinking” mode that searches the web, self‑checks, and produces up to eight coherent images at once, supporting 2K resolution and a wide aspect‑ratio range. title: 海信、格力「真铜实料」之争再有新剧情，格力被指「多三两铜就敢多卖500块」，这合理吗？双方到底在争啥？
content: The “real copper” dispute between Haier and Gree resumes. Gree claims all its consumer air‑conditioners use 100% copper in evaporator, condenser, compressor and fan motors, rejecting any aluminum‑wire models. Haier’s brand director counters that the extra copper weight is negligible—about 5‑20 g per unit—yet increases prices by roughly 500 ¥, arguing the era of charging for extra copper has ended. The debate centers on whether using copper and how much truly affects quality and cost.

title: 亚马逊向 Anthropic 追加最高 250 亿美元投资
content: Amazon has announced an expanded partnership with Anthropic, increasing its investment in the AI startup to up to $25 billion over the next decade. The deal includes Amazon purchasing more than $100 billion of Anthropic‑powered compute from AWS. Amazon will provide an initial $5 billion immediately, with the remaining $20 billion contingent on reaching future business milestones.

title: 谷歌组建团队专攻 AI 编程，追赶 Claude
content: Google DeepMind has formed an elite “Gemini” team, led by Sebastian Borgeaud, to strengthen its AI programming abilities and close the gap with Anthropic’s Claude. The team focuses on long‑term, complex coding challenges, using internal intelligent‑agent tools and AI‑driven workflows. Google co‑founder Sergey Brin and the CTO emphasize that robust coding skills are essential for AI self‑improvement. Progress is tracked via “Jetski” usage metrics, and engineers receive targeted training to accelerate the adoption of AI‑assisted development.

title: 新兴市场为何无视伊朗的负面消息
content: Emerging markets are largely ignoring recent negative news about Iran because they view it as a regional, not global, issue that unlikely to impact asset prices. Investors focus on fundamentals such as growth prospects, inflation, and currency stability, and fear that reacting to geopolitical headlines could create volatility. Thus, concern over Iran is downplayed in favor of more direct economic factors driving market performance.

title: 28岁中国留学生迷奸女友轰动全球，背后的产业链更让人头皮发麻... | 原文
content: A 28‑year‑old Chinese student in Munich repeatedly drugged, sexually assaulted, and secretly filmed his girlfriend with potent anesthetic drugs such as Triazolam and Midazolam. The case was categorized as attempted murder and he received an 11‑year sentence. Investigations revealed this was linked to a broader network involving the procurement of such drugs for abuse, indicating a more extensive illicit supply chain behind the crime.

title: 阿里云的 coding plan 莫名奇妙被冻结了
content: Alibaba Cloud’s Coding Plan was unexpectedly suspended. Customer service explained that the plan is only for interactive programming; automated scripts, background processes, non‑interactive bulk calls, account sharing, or key sharing are prohibited. Even using the plan for a “lily‑frog” breeding app (OpenClaw) triggered a violation if the calls were detected as non‑interactive. The suspension cannot be appealed, but a refund may be requested.

title: 如何评价最新发布的 GPT-Image-2，有哪些亮点值得关注？
content: OpenAI has released GPT‑Image‑2, a fully available image generation model. Compared with the earlier nano‑banana model, GPT‑Image‑2 offers improved fidelity, broader content coverage, and better text‑to‑image consistency. It is expected to advance the AIGC image creation sector by providing higher quality outputs and more flexible prompts. Its architecture—incorporating advanced transformer layers and large‑scale training data—offers insights for research on generative models. Commercially, the model can be applied to content generation, advertising, and creative design.
